compiled_state.title: commit-workflow: plugin-cache compute-diff-hash.sh produces different hash than worktree version -> review gate rejects commit
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

The commit workflow uses `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh` (plugin cache version) to capture the diff hash for review recording, but the pre-commit review gate uses the worktree's `plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh` to verify the hash at commit time. The two scripts produce different hashes for the same staged changes, causing the review gate to reject commits with 'diff hash mismatch'.

## Actual Behavior

COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 2 instructs:
```
DIFF_HASH=$("${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh")
```
The plugin cache script produces hash A. The pre-commit gate runs the worktree script, produces hash B. record-review.sh records hash A. The gate checks hash B ≠ recorded A → commit blocked.

## Evidence

Session worktree-20260409-192221 experienced this repeatedly:
- Plugin cache hash: 269b599f...
- Worktree hash: acbee271...
- Required 3 re-dispatch cycles to resolve

## Expected Behavior

Both the commit workflow and the pre-commit gate should use the same `compute-diff-hash.sh`. The canonical script for any worktree session is the worktree's copy at `$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh`.

## Fix Direction

COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md Step 2 should use:
```
DIFF_HASH=$("$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh")
```
The record-review.sh call in Step 5 should pass the WORKTREE hash (not plugin-cache hash) as `--expected-hash`.
